era: Indie Rock. E=4 -- dry wit, post-punk influenced, slacker-adjacent. Capitol Hill 2010s. Hardly Art streak begins (201-204). v1.49.342.

location.origin: Capitol Hill, Seattle (via Walla Walla / Whitman College)
location.formative: Whitman College (Walla Walla, WA). Relocated to Capitol Hill.
location.career: Chastity Belt. 2010-present. Hardly Art. All-female indie rock. Post-punk influenced.

formed: Walla Walla, Washington (relocated to Capitol Hill, Seattle)

members.name: Julia Shapiro
members.note: Flat, conversational, deadpan delivery. Post-punk influence. Dry wit.

members.name: Lydia Lund
members.note: Angular guitar lines. Post-punk interlocking with Shapiro.

members.name: Annie Truscott
members.note: Melodic, prominent bass. Carries harmonic foundation.

associated_musicians.name: Tacocat
associated_musicians.note: Capitol Hill feminist network. Hardly Art labelmate (203).

associated_musicians.name: Childbirth
associated_musicians.note: Supergroup with Chastity Belt members. Hardly Art (204).

theory_nodes.concept: Hardly Art streak begins -- four consecutive Hardly Art entries (201-204). Sub Pop subsidiary. Feminist punk-indie axis. Densest label streak since Sub Pop's own run.
examples: All Hardly Art. All Capitol Hill. All feminist.
theory_nodes.description: Hardly Art streak. Sub Pop subsidiary. Four consecutive entries.

genealogy.relationship: Chastity Belt at 201. First Hardly Art entry. Streak begins.

theory_nodes.concept: Slacker-indie E=4 -- not quiet enough for E=3 (twee), not loud enough for E=5. The sweet spot of deliberate looseness. Studied nonchalance.
examples: Chastity Belt (201): restraint through studied nonchalance.
theory_nodes.description: Slacker-indie E=4. Deliberate looseness. Casual craft.

genealogy.relationship: Chastity Belt at 201. E=4 through nonchalance.

theory_nodes.concept: Capitol Hill feminist music network -- Chastity Belt, Tacocat, Childbirth. Shared members, shows, venues, values. Not a scene but a network. Riot grrrl's next generation.
theory_nodes.description: Feminist music network. Capitol Hill 2010s. Riot grrrl descendants.

cross_references.relationship: Indie heavyweight to indie wit. Emotional earnestness to deadpan irony. Same neighborhood, different decades.
Hardly Art streak continues. Indie rock to surf rock. Genre Stage 106.
Hardly Art. Feminist punk pop. Capitol Hill network. Member overlap with Childbirth.
Hardly Art streak completes. Supergroup featuring Chastity Belt members. Network made explicit.
